name_en: 🎉【New】Model 837466 This new Gucci SoftBit shoulder bag reimagines the brand's classic accessory with an oversized half-horsebit silhouette. The casual shape features a magnetic closure and is crafted from richly textured soft grained leather, combining aesthetic appeal with practical function.
name_cn:
🎉【New】Model 837466 This new Gucci SoftBit shoulder bag reimagines the brand's classic accessory with an oversized half-horsebit silhouette. The casual shape features a magnetic closure and is crafted from richly textured soft grained leather, combining aesthetic appeal with practical function.
Deep green grained leather
Gold-tone hardware
Brown microfiber lining
Interior: Removable clutch
Strap: 20cm high
Dimensions: 46cm (W) x 26cm (H) x 16cm (D)
Weight: Approx. 1.4kg
Color: Brown full-grain leather/Original leather.
Made in Italy
